backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining the e-commerce backend with types for products, orders, carts, wishlists, and reviews, plus CRUD operations and role-based access control via MixinAuthorization.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping the 'complete and runnable frontend' feature to its associated source files, components, and test IDs with high confidence.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document summarizing each frontend source file's purpose and the specific TypeScript/lint fixes applied to make the app compile cleanly.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens used throughout the app.
frontend/index.html: HTML shell for the Vite/React app, mounting the React root div and loading the main TypeScript entry point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main application component that sets up TanStack Router with all page routes, QueryClientProvider, ThemeProvider, and a shared Layout with Header/Footer.
frontend/src/components/AccessDeniedScre: Displays a centered access-denied message with a shield icon and a link back to the home page.
frontend/src/components/CartItemCard.tsx: Cart item row component showing product image, name, variant details, quantity controls, line-item price, and a remove button with loading states.
frontend/src/components/CategoryCard.tsx: A clickable card component linking to filtered product listings, displaying a category image with gradient overlay, name, product count, and a 'Shop Now' button with hover effects.
frontend/src/components/ColorVariantSele: A color swatch selector component that maps color names to CSS colors and renders circular buttons with selection/hover states for choosing product color variants.
frontend/src/components/FilterPanel.tsx: A filter sidebar component providing category, subcategory, and price range controls with checkboxes and a slider, plus a 'Clear All' reset button for product listing pages.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site footer with brand logo, shop/account navigation links, social media icons, and a copyright notice.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky navigation header with logo, desktop/mobile nav links, search bar, cart badge, wishlist, profile dropdown, and Internet Identity login/logout functionality.
frontend/src/components/HeroCarousel.tsx: Auto-advancing hero banner carousel with three hardcoded slides, manual prev/next navigation, dot indicators, and pause-on-hover behavior.
frontend/src/components/OrderManagementT: Admin table component that fetches and displays all orders sorted by date, with color-coded status badges and a dropdown to update each order's status.
frontend/src/components/OrderStatusTimel: Renders a vertical step-by-step order status timeline with gold indicators, checkmarks, and timestamps for each status stage, handling both normal progression and cancelled orders.
frontend/src/components/OrderSummary.tsx: Displays an order summary panel computing subtotal, discounts, shipping (free over $100), and total, with an optional checkout button or link.
frontend/src/components/PaymentMethodSel: Provides a payment method selector UI supporting UPI, credit/debit card, digital wallet, and cash on delivery, with inline card detail fields when credit card is selected.
frontend/src/components/ProductCard.tsx: Renders a product card with image, discount badge, wishlist toggle, and add-to-cart button, linking to the product detail page; exports a skeleton variant for loading states.
frontend/src/components/ProductFormModal: A modal dialog form for creating or editing a product, managing fields like name, price, category, image URLs, and variants, and submitting via add/update product mutations.
frontend/src/components/ProductImageGall: Displays a product image gallery with a main view, previous/next navigation arrows, an image counter, and a scrollable thumbnail strip, handling broken images gracefully.
frontend/src/components/ProductManagemen: Admin table component for listing all products with add, edit, and delete actions, using confirmation dialogs and toast notifications.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Modal dialog that prompts newly authenticated users to fill in their name, email, and phone to create a profile, shown only when no profile exists.
frontend/src/components/QuantityPicker.t: Reusable increment/decrement quantity picker component with configurable min/max bounds and disabled state.
frontend/src/components/ReviewsList.tsx: Displays product reviews with average star rating and an inline form for authenticated users to submit new reviews.
frontend/src/components/ShippingAddressF: Controlled form component for collecting all required shipping address fields, rendered in a responsive two-column grid.
frontend/src/components/SizeSelector.tsx: Button-group size selector that highlights the selected size with a gold accent style.
frontend/src/components/SortDropdown.tsx: Dropdown select component offering four sort options (popularity, price asc/desc, newest) for product listings.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using the current Internet Identity, initializing admin access control and invalidating dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing ICP Internet Identity authentication state, including login, logout, and identity persistence via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines all React Query hooks for backend interactions, covering products, user profile, cart, wishlist, orders, and reviews using the ICP actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet for the Luxe Store app, defining OKLCH-based design tokens (gold/ivory/charcoal palette), Tailwind directives, and utility classes for light and dark themes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/AdminPanel.tsx: Admin panel page that checks caller identity and admin status, then renders tabbed product and order management tables, or shows an access denied screen.
frontend/src/pages/Cart.tsx: Shopping cart page that displays cart items with product details, handles item removal by rebuilding the cart, and shows an order summary with navigation to checkout.
frontend/src/pages/Checkout.tsx: Multi-step checkout wizard (Shipping → Payment → Review) that collects a shipping address and payment method, then places an order and navigates to the confirmation page.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Home page featuring a hero carousel, category cards, a featured products grid, and a new arrivals section, all populated from the backend product list.
frontend/src/pages/OrderConfirmation.tsx: Displays a post-purchase confirmation page showing order ID, status, items, shipping address, payment method, and total, with navigation to order tracking via /orders/$orderId.
frontend/src/pages/OrderHistory.tsx: Lists all user orders sorted by date with status badges, handles unauthenticated and empty states, and navigates to individual order tracking pages at /orders/$orderId.
frontend/src/pages/OrderTracking.tsx: Shows a detailed order tracking page with a visual status timeline, shipping address, payment method, and order items, fetched by orderId from the /orders/$orderId route.
frontend/src/pages/ProductDetail.tsx: Renders a product detail page with image gallery, size/color variant selectors, quantity picker, add-to-cart and wishlist actions, and a reviews list.
frontend/src/pages/ProductListing.tsx: Product catalog page with a responsive filter sidebar (desktop) and sheet (mobile), sort dropdown, and a filtered/sorted product grid derived from all loaded products.
frontend/src/pages/Profile.tsx: User profile page that displays and allows editing of name, email, and phone fields, with Internet Identity login gating and skeleton loading states.
frontend/src/pages/SearchResults.tsx: Search results page that fetches products by keyword and applies client-side category, subcategory, price filters, and sorting with a responsive filter sidebar/sheet.
frontend/src/pages/Wishlist.tsx: Wishlist page that displays saved products for authenticated users, supporting move-to-cart and remove actions with login gating and loading skeletons.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module providing helpers for reading/writing URL query params, sessionStorage persistence, price/timestamp formatting, and order status label/color mapping.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining a luxury design system with custom fonts, CSS-variable-mapped colors (gold, charcoal, ivory palettes), border radii, box shadows, and keyframe animations.
project_state.json: Defines the project state (version 5) for a professional luxury fashion/lifestyle e-commerce mobile app targeting Android and iOS, listing all existing features, architectural notes, and requirements covering UI theme, home screen, catalog, product detail, cart, checkout, auth, order tracking, admin panel, notifications, and search.
